"Every dish that leaves our kitchen is made to order — fresh dough, fresh filling, fresh fire. No shortcuts, ever."

Our Story

From Cloud to Street

Started in 2024 as a cloud kitchen, Box & Bowl is now a full-fledged culinary destination — with a beloved cloud kitchen and a thriving offline outlet at Happy Chowk, Nawada, serving some of the best momos in the area.

What started as a passion for the perfect momo has grown into a full menu of handcrafted Indo-Chinese favourites. Every order is made fresh — never frozen, never rushed.

And now we're excited to launch our latest creation — the Momo Burger. Crispy momo meets burger bun. A Box & Bowl original.
